name: FrankOS Governance
description: Runtime governance guardrails for constitutional permit/prohibit/escalate decisions.

mode.label: Enforcement Mode
mode.help: off = disabled, shadow = evaluate+log only, enforce = block prohibit/escalate decisions

emitDecisionLog.label: Emit Decision Events
emitDecisionLog.help: Emit governance.decision diagnostic events for each evaluated mutating tool call

mutatingTools.label: Mutating Tools
mutatingTools.help: Optional override list of tool names treated as mutating
